docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text:
Welcome!

This document will assist organizations in using Github Actions Runners equipped with Ascend NPU chips.

If your organization would like to use the runners, configure your organization according to the user manual.

If you encounter any issues while using the documentation, please submit an issue.

docs.title: Future Plans
docs.text: Currently, the only way to connect to NPU Runners is using Github App. We plan to provide a Github application, such as pr-robot, to run NPU Runners without installing Github App and update this document accordingly.

docs.title: Repo
docs.text:
NPU runners have been integrated into the following repositories:

vllm-project/vllm-ascend

nv-action/vllm-benchmark

cosdt/pytorch-integration-tests

Ascend/Ascend-CI

docs.title: User Manual
docs.text:
This document provides two methods to integrate with NPU Runners.

GitHub App enables repositories within the same organization to integrate NPU Runners with one single configuration. However, installing the GitHub App requires permission of your organization administrators.

Personal Access Tokens (classic) allow users to configure individual repository without requiring approval from organization administrators.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text: Require administrative permissions for the organization.

docs.title: Install GitHub App
docs.text: Visit apps/ascend-runner-mgmt in your browser and click Install. Select the organization and repositories, then click Install.

docs.title: Generate a Runner Group
docs.text:
Go to the Settings of organization → Actions → Runner groups → New runner group.

Configure repositories and workflows in the creation page. Note the Group name, you will use it later. To allow public repositories to access ·NPU Runners·, enable Allow public repositories.

docs.title: Submit a Request for enable App
docs.text:
Visit https://github.com/ascend-gha-runners/org-archive/issues and click New issue to select a template.

  • Add Or Modify Organization: Create or update organization configurations.
  • Delete Organization: Remove an organization.

docs.title: Add Or Modify Organizaiton
docs.text: Fill in the parameters and click Create. org-name：Full name of the organization. runner-group-name: The name of runner group。 npu-counts: The number of NPUs mounted by the runners。

docs.title: Delete Organization
docs.text: Fill in the parameters and click Create. org-name：Full name of the organization.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text: You must have repository access permissions. Both `public and private repositories can be accessed to NPU Runners via PAT.

docs.title: Generate a Token
docs.text:
Navigate to your personal account: Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Tokens (classic) → Generate new token → Generate new token (classic).

Fill in a token name, select an expiration period.

Under permissions, enable the repo scope.

Click Generate token to create the token.

docs.title: Submit a Request to Activate the Application
docs.text:
To ensure token confidentiality, send an email to gouzhonglin@huawei.com with the following details: Email Subject: Request Ascend NPU Runners

Email Body Template:

repo: my-org/my-repo
token: ghp_xxx
expire-at: 30days

docs.title: NPU Runners names
docs.text:
NPU Runners names consist of the following components:

linux-amd64-npu-x
^     ^     ^   ^
|     |     |   |
|     |     |   Number of NPUs Available
|     |     NPU Designator
|     Architecture
Operating System

docs.title: View via Configuration File
docs.text: We maintain the latest configuration of all organizations connected to NPU Runners in the https://github.com/ascend-gha-runners/org-archive/tree/main/org-archive/ directory. View your organization’s configuration in <your-org>.yaml, where the online-runners field displays the available NPU Runners.

docs.title: View via Runner Groups
docs.text: Navigate to the Settings of organization → Actions → Runner groups. Configured NPU Runners (e.g., linux-arm64-npu-1, linux-arm64-npu-2) will be visible under your runner group.

docs.title: Use NPU Runners in Workflows
docs.text:
NPU jobs must run in a container (e.g., ascendai/cann:latest). If no container is specified, the job will not utilize NPU resources. The following example shows how a GitHub Action workflow uses NPU Runners.

name: Test NPU Runner
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
jobs:
  job_0:
    runs-on: linux-arm64-npu-1
    container:
      image: ascendai/cann:latest

    steps:
      - name: Show NPU info
        run: |
          npu-smi info

If you have any questions, please file a discussion.

docs.title: 用户手册
docs.text: 本文档提供2种方法接入NPU Runners。 Github App使得同一个组织内的仓库只需配置一次即可接入NPU Runners，但是安装Github App需要联系组织管理员处理。 而Personal access tokens (classic)允许用户配置单个仓库，无需组织管理员同意。

docs.title: 通过 GitHub App 安装
准备工作
docs.text: 需要具备组织的管理权限.

docs.title: 安装 Github App
docs.text: 浏览器访问apps/ascend-runner-mgmt并且点击Install。 选择组织，选择仓库，点击Install。

docs.title: 配置Runner group
docs.text:
依次点击组织的Settings, Actions, Runner groups, New runner group，进入创建页面。

在新建页面配置仓库和workflow。保存Group name，稍后会用到。 如果想让public仓库接入NPU Runners，必须点击Allow public repositories。

docs.title: 提交申请激活应用
docs.text:
浏览器输入https://github.com/ascend-gha-runners/org-archive/issues，点击New issue选择模板。

  • Add Or Modify Organizaiton表示新建或者更新组织配置。
  • Delete Organization表示删除组织。

docs.title: 添加或者修改组织
docs.text: 填写配置参数后点击Create。 org-name表示您的组织名称。 runner-group-name表示Runner group的名称。 npu-counts表示NPU Runners挂载的NPU卡数量。

docs.title: 删除组织
docs.text: 填写配置参数后点击Create。 org-name表示您的组织名称。

docs.title: 通过 Personal access tokens (classic) 安装
准备工作
docs.text: 需要具备仓库的访问权限。公共仓库和私有仓库都可以通过PAT接入NPU Runners。

docs.title: 生成 token
docs.text: 依次点击个人账户的Settings, Developer settings, Personal access tokens, Tokens (classic), Generate new token, Generate new token (classic)。 填写名称，选择过期时间，点击repo，点击Generate token，即生成token。

docs.title: 提交申请激活应用
docs.text:
考虑到token保密需求，申请方式是向gouzhonglin@huawei.com发送邮件。 邮件主题模板：Request Ascend NPU Runners 邮件内容模板：

repo: my-org/my-repo
token: ghp_xxx
expire-at: 30days

docs.title: NPU Runners命名规范
docs.text:
NPU Runners由以下部分组成：

linux-amd64-npu-x
^     ^     ^   ^
|     |     |   |
|     |     |   Number of NPUs Available
|     |     NPU Designator
|     Architecture
Operating System

docs.title: 通过归档文件查看
docs.text: 我们在https://github.com/ascend-gha-runners/org-archive/tree/main/org-archive/目录维护接入NPU Runners的所有组织的最新配置状态。在<your-org>.yaml中查看您的组织。其中online-runners字段展示NPU Runners。

docs.title: 通过Runner group查看
docs.text: 依次点击组织的Settings, Actions, Runner groups。在自己配置的runner group里就能看到runners，比如图中的linux-arm64-npu-1, linux-arm64-npu-2。

docs.title: 在workflow中使用NPU Runners
docs.text:
NPU jobs必须运行在容器中(比如：ascendai/cann:latest)。如果未指定容器，则job不会调用NPU资源。 以下例子展示Github Action workflow如何使用NPU Runners。

name: Test NPU Runner
on:
  workflow_dispatch:
jobs:
  job_0:
    runs-on: linux-arm64-npu-1
    container:
      image: ascendai/cann:latest

    steps:
      - name: Show NPU info
        run: |
          npu-smi info

如果有任何问题，请提出discussion。
